children.text: transmit a notice of the filing to the Federal Register for publication; and
request interested persons to submit relevant information and documents.

children.heading: .—Preliminary Review and Rejection
children.label: b .—Preliminary Review and Rejection
children.text: After preliminary review, the Commission shall reject an agreement that it finds does not meet the requirements of sections 40302 and 40303 of this title. The Commission shall notify in writing the person filing the agreement of the reason for rejection.
on the 45th day after filing, or on the 30th day after notice of the filing is published in the Federal Register, whichever is later; or

children.label: A
children.text: on the 45th day after the Commission receives all the additional information and documents; or

children.label: B
children.text: if the request is not fully complied with, on the 45th day after the Commission receives the information and documents submitted and a statement of the reasons for noncompliance with the request.

children.heading: .—Request for Additional Information
children.label: d .—Request for Additional Information
children.text: Before the expiration of the period specified in subsection (c)(1), the Commission may request from the person filing the agreement any additional information and documents the Commission considers necessary to make the determinations required by this part.

children.heading: .—Shortening
children.label: 1 .—Shortening
children.text: On request of the party filing an agreement, the Commission may shorten a period specified in subsection (c), but not to a date that is less than 14 days after notice of the filing of the agreement is published in the Federal Register.

children.heading: .—Extension
children.label: 2 .—Extension
children.text: The period specified in subsection (c)(2) may be extended only by the United States District Court for the District of Columbia in a civil action brought by the Commission under .section 41307(c) of this title

children.heading: .—Fixed Terms
children.label: f .—Fixed Terms
children.text: The Commission may not limit the effectiveness of an agreement to a fixed term.
